title: Bentley Retail Roller and Tray, Blue, 4"
features: Our capable and reliable mid-range DIY products
4" Roller & Tray Set, with 1 x Gloss & 1 x Foam refill
For best results, rinse before and clean thoroughly after use
Durable, reusable and easy to maintain
description: Our capable and reliable mid-range DIY set, featuring brushes, rollers, scrapers, sandpaper and more. Perfect for quality-conscious shoppers, the brushes in this range boast synthetic loss-free bristles, meaning stray bristles are rare. With this range, mess is kept to an absolute minimum.
